Panopto lecture capture service. Panopto lets record publish lectures other class activities online. Students then view (and review) published materials using browser mobile device. Panopto modes: pre-record then post video lectures, broadcast live lecture (with delay). first mode allows upload video content notes your course materials. Panopto meant used tool. find more about Panopto, visit Panopto Help Center.

Canvas Gradebook helps easily record student scores online, track student progress calculate final grades. Grades each assignment calculated points, complete incomplete, pass fail, scale, letter grades. Provide secure access view edit student grades. Publish scores students view securely online.
GradePage simple interface quarterly grade submission, used GradeBook users, Canvas users those manage their grades using other software approach.
Methods available accessing campus materials from your personal laptop home computer. First check with your support staff; your department already have system place accessing files from home.

preferred method connecting through Husky OnNet (based BIG-IP platform) which provides individual users with secure temporary connection network from remote locations. Husky OnNet MacOS Husky OnNet Windows available download from UWare. Android, iOS,and other BIG-IP apps available from stores.
Remote desktop access allows access your work computer using another computer with connection Internet. Your icons, programs printers available. even transfer files between your systems. (For security purposes, remote desktop should only used with secure connection network such Husky OnNet.) order remote desktop access, your work computer will need remain (you logged out, computer must turned off) will need know your work computer's current address name. need help finding your address, contact your local support staff. Find more about this option Connecting Remotely.
Because remote desktop access requires your work computer remain when work, better option store your materials online (see "Store Your Course Materials Online" section, below) then Husky OnNet (see "Connect Networks" section, below).

original text:
know, know it's Saturday. yesterday busy, then sunny walked after work. this morning I've been upgrading Windows reading offline.
Canva love this quickly pulling together photos I've taken, creating mash Daily Create. made image this post with Canva using some photos that took yesterday.
Pullquote neat little Chrome etc. this quickly tweet things that longer than character limit.
love this annotation tool especially adding gifs images side blog posts.
Plant.net Another when walking around Scottish Highlands Islands. Great unknown plants confirming when unsure.
Pocket often when come across something want read, want save read later. This another Chrome extension that save stuff when have time read
That's five regular apps online. What your favourites?
This entry posted #CLMOOC, Garden, Online learning, Photos, Scotland, Technology tagged #clmooc, Canva, Pl@nt.net, pocket, Bookmark permalink.
